extraction.one_line_summary: ROGLIC attacked final climb to win stage while teammate KUSS rode defensively with GC group, taking race lead via time bonuses.
tactical_patterns: Jumbo-Visma deployed dual threat with Roglic free to attack while Kuss marked threats, optimal resource allocation.
EVENEPOEL did excessive front work on final climb despite no teammate support, tactical error gifting Roglic stage.
Early breakaway of 29 splintered via crosswind attacks before Category 2 climb, eliminating weaker climbers pre-finale.
DE HANT solo bridged ahead of 29-rider chase then strategically sat up for teammate Sepulveda's KOM points.

rider_signals.KUSS Sepp: positive: Took race lead while riding purely defensively, suggests team protecting GC options over stage hunting
rider_signals.EVENEPOEL Remco: negative: Led chase completely alone on final climb with no teammates, tactical isolation versus Jumbo depth
rider_signals.VLASOV Alexander: positive: Recovered after appearing dropped on earlier climbs to finish with GC group, durability signal
rider_signals.MARTINEZ Lenny: negative: Lost over minute to GC group despite starting in red jersey, exposed on mountainous terrain
rider_signals.CARTHY Hugh: neutral: Survived breakaway chaos to finish, positioning for overall gains without domestique duties
